description_long: This object is a vintage-style record player featuring a prominent, flared horn speaker reminiscent of early gramophones. The main body is rectangular with a flat top surface that houses a circular turntable platter, which holds a vinyl record with a visible label at its center. A curved tonearm extends from the side, arching over the platter, and appears to be fixed in place. The front and side panels display some text and decorative elements, while the base is solid and slightly raised. The horn speaker is large, multi-petaled, and positioned at an upward angle, dominating the visual profile of the device. The overall color scheme is primarily white with black and gold accents on the platter and record.
description: A vintage record player with a large, flared horn speaker, a flat rectangular base, and a visible vinyl record on the turntable. The device is mostly white with black and gold details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the horn speaker angled to the right, the vinyl record on the platter, and the 'WONDER SOUND' text on the front panel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the horn speaker, the tonearm arching over the platter, and the record's label clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear angled view with the horn speaker facing left, the turntable platter and record visible, and some text partially seen on the side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the horn speaker from behind, the tonearm, and the record on the platter with the base structure visible.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present and centrally located on the top surface, circular in shape, and proportionally smaller than the base but large enough to hold a standard vinyl record. It appears to be made of black plastic or metal, with a smooth, matte finish and a visible gold label at the center. The platter is flat and slightly raised, with subtle grooves or patterns indicating its function.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, curved, and extends from the right side of the base, arching over the platter. It is medium in length, appears to be made of white or light-colored plastic or metal, and has a smooth, matte finish. The tonearm is positioned as if ready to play the record, with no visible joints or mechanisms.
attribute_control_knobs: A single control knob is visible on the right side of the base, small and round, likely made of plastic or metal, and colored white or silver. It is positioned near the front edge, with no visible labels or markings.
